rationale: The citing paper mentions Hartmann et al. (2021) in the introduction as one example of prior work on photo effects, noting its finding that different image types drive different engagement outcomes. This citation is used in a grouped background passage with other studies to motivate a gap (prior work focuses on photos without considering text). The paper does not build hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or empirical design on Hartmann et al. specifically later in the article.
